theme: 再大的困难，也会被持续的行动一点点改变。

scenes.on_screen_text: 愚公家门前，挡着两座大山
scenes.visual_description: An elderly Chinese farmer standing before two enormous mountains that block the narrow path out of a small ancient village, tiny houses below, generous sky and negative space, clear sense of scale
scenes.notes: 建立大山与人物的尺度反差，不要画文字。

scenes.on_screen_text: 他想让孩子们，看见更远的地方
scenes.visual_description: The old farmer gently pointing beyond the mountains while several children stand beside him and imagine the distant open world, warm family expressions, restrained ancient Chinese rural setting
scenes.notes: 突出愿望而不是口号，不要画文字。

scenes.visual_description: A multigenerational family beginning to dig at the foot of a mountain with wooden hoes, baskets and simple tools, cooperative gestures, small figures against the rock face
scenes.notes: 劳动动作清楚但克制，不要画文字。

scenes.on_screen_text: 石头很硬，他们每天只搬走一点点
scenes.visual_description: Close storybook view of worn hands placing rough stones into a bamboo carrying basket, the old farmer and family working steadily in the background, visible effort without danger
scenes.notes: 用细节表现缓慢积累，不要画文字。

scenes.on_screen_text: 有人笑他：你怎么可能搬走大山？
scenes.visual_description: A skeptical passerby speaking to the elderly farmer beside piles of newly moved stones, the farmer rests calmly on his hoe, child-friendly expressions and no aggressive confrontation
scenes.notes: 冲突温和，重点在愚公的平静，不要画文字。

scenes.on_screen_text: 只要不停下来，山就会越来越小
scenes.visual_description: The old farmer smiling gently while children and grandchildren continue carrying baskets behind him, a small but clearly visible notch already opened in the mountain
scenes.notes: 回答用画面表现代际接力，不要画文字。

scenes.on_screen_text: 一年又一年，一筐又一筐
scenes.visual_description: Poetic passage of time at the mountain path: older and younger family members pass baskets hand to hand, subtle seasonal traces, the path gradually becoming wider and brighter
scenes.notes: 表现时间流逝与持续行动，不要画文字。

scenes.on_screen_text: 从未停下的脚步，终于让大山让了路
scenes.visual_description: A new open path between the mountains at sunrise, children running toward the vast bright sky beyond while the elderly farmer and family watch together from behind, uplifting yet restrained ending
key_actions: 孩子们沿新路奔向阳光
scenes.notes: 结尾强调道路、天空和共同完成，不要画文字。
